'''Ye-4 gunships''', also called '''Imperial Gunboats''', were heavily armed [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]] employed by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:XwingsVsYe4-RECG.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Two X-wings attacking a Ye-4]]
Two vertical stabilizers protruded from the top and bottom of the ship's rear. It was armed with six turret weapons that could effortlessly destroy enemy [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Two of its weapons were forward-firing, two were able to fire in a 180 degree arc above the ship, one was mounted aft to fire at pursuing vessels, while the last was mounted under the cockpit section to cover the gunship's belly.

The ship's design was similar to [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]' [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]].

==History==
Ye-4 gunships were designed by Sienar Fleet Systems specifically for patrolling the [[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]].<ref name="RECG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ye-4 gunships, also called gunboats, were mid-sized ships introduced in the [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed|''Jump to Lightspeed'']] expansion of ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' as NPC ships. They were mainly found in deep space and the [[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]], but occasionally appeared in other [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] as well.

With the introduction of Chapter 8 in January 2008 the Ye-4 became a multiplayer ship available to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ace [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. It was one of several ships made playable in Chapter 8 along with the [[X4 Gunship/Legends|X4 Gunship]], the [[AEG-77 Vigo]], and the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]].<ref name="SonyCite-Chapter 8: The Nova Orion Crisis">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67563&month=012008|text=Chapter 8: The Nova Orion Crisis}}</ref>
